stemHtml: It can be stated, concerning a Mercator chart, that:

options.a: the projection from the centre of the earth on a cylinder gives conformity.
options.b: it is designated as a cylindrical projection but it is, in fact, mathematically produced.
options.c: it is a projection from the centre of the earth via straight lines on a cylinder tangential to the equator.
options.d: projection on a cylinder is the exact way of construction of Mercator charts.
